given an integer array nums reorder it such that nums[0] <= nums[1] >= nums[2] <= nums[3]... you may assume the input array always has a valid answer however you must ensure that adjacent elements are not equal if possible if it is not possible to avoid equal adjacent elements return the array as is

the error in the code is that it fails to properly alternate the elements between increasing and decreasing patterns the correction involves ensuring that the elements are alternated correctly between increasing and decreasing sequences while maintaining the required constraints
